title: Add support for forward type declarations

features.name: forward_type_declaration
features.description: Code should include a forward type declaration using typedef before the actual type is defined

features.name: forward_type_with_basic_kind
features.description: Code should include a forward type declaration with a basic type kind specification (struct, union, or class)
features.snippet:
typedef struct T;
typedef int T;

features.name: multiple_forward_type_declarations
features.description: Code should include multiple forward type declarations for the same type name
